summary: Retest of iteration_4 HIGH-priority UI bug fix (pointer-events-none on decorative blur divs). VERIFIED FIXED. Login as admin -> /dashboard: document.elementFromPoint at center of [data-testid=generate-ai] now returns SPAN.ml-2 (child of the AI Predict button, isBtnOrChild=true) instead of the blur div. NORMAL (no force=True) Playwright click on AI Predict fires the handler; 3 AI prediction sets rendered within ~10s. Statistical button also works with normal click, renders 3 sets. Save-prediction-0 (AI) persists to backend and appears on /saved (3 saved items visible: 2 AI + 1 statistical from prior + current runs). Full regression flow green.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix applied correctly at Dashboard.jsx line 118: `pointer-events-none` added to the decorative sky-500 blur div; aria-hidden=true retained. Auth.jsx and Landing.jsx defensive copies also carry the class per E1 report (not user-visible impact, so not re-exercised).
PRE-EXISTING (unchanged): backend_test.py still hard-codes fallback BASE_URL - per env policy this should raise when REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is unset.
PRE-EXISTING (unchanged): PWA sw.js served but not registered in index.html - offline caching inactive.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - AI Predict normal click works, Statistical normal click works, save+/saved regression pass

seed_data_creation: Added 1 AI-saved prediction during this retest run under admin account (now 3 total saved items shown on /saved).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_4 HIGH-priority pointer-events overlay bug is CLOSED. All backend flows (28/28) and frontend flows previously verified in iteration_4 remain intact. No open issues. If further changes land, re-run backend pytest + repeat the login -> generate AI -> save -> /saved smoke flow using the testids: auth-email-input, auth-password-input, auth-submit, generate-ai, generate-statistical, prediction-set-<i>, save-prediction-<i>, saved-item-<id>, delete-saved-<id>.
rca of the issue: N/A - fix from iteration_4 verified; issue is RESOLVED.
